# Section Generator

Create a new assembly section.

## Input
SECTION NAME:
HAS VARIANTS:
[List variants if applicable]

## Tasks

1. CREATE STRUCTURE
/docs/assembly/[section-name]/

2. CREATE FILES
- index.md
- materials.md

3. YAML
- Add section entry
- Define base materials
- Define variant materials

4. MATERIALS PAGE
- Derived from YAML ONLY

5. INSTRUCTIONS
- Overview
- Materials link
- Step-by-step format

## VALIDATION
- YAML is source of truth
- Naming consistency
- No spaces in filenames

## Constraints
- Do NOT hardcode materials
